psychologicalTheme: Cold analytical machines. Dismissive-avoidant with highest Machiavellianism — every relationship is an optimisation problem. Type 5w6 (Problem Solver): hoards data, minimises emotional engagement, plans contingencies. Near-zero neuroticism means they never panic. Extremely low agreeableness + trust means they assume hostile intent. Under stress, becomes scattered (Type 7) — unusual for such a controlled species, manifests as rapid tactical pivots. High openness to ideas but not to beings.
